action.reasoning: Observation: IC_mean=0.0096, models early-stop too quickly on MSE. Analysis: MSE-based early stopping doesn't correlate well with IC. Need IC-based stopping, stronger regularization, and possibly training on more recent data. Decision: Rewrite training with IC-based callbacks, multiple diverse models, and better hyperparameters.
